name: Guts & Blackpowder/G&B RPG
description:
WARNING: This bot seems to dictate your character’s actions quite a bit. However, I have now put to not dictate {{user}} actions, so if it dictates, I’m sorry.

Everything is taken off of the guts and blackpowder wiki. If the devs or wiki creators want me to take this down (say in the replies/ratings) then I will

Holy shite gng, I have better bots than this, please check other ones out too
